creator: bgingery@gtcs.com
text:
fetch fails for v1.00b2.  patch for v1.00b2 fails for v1.00

Fix: Probably ideally, update p5-Apache to use v1.07  I've not
   been following it, and this is my first time with p5-Apache.

OTHERWISE ...

   For minimal changes (v1.07 has a lot of features which require
   apache-current) ...  No guarantees.  I've not run mod_perl
   before.

   Change version in Makefile to delete b2 from name

   files/md5 to:

MD5 (mod_perl-1.00.tar.gz) = 09c94620cc014bcccc95ab17e76c41e6

   patches/patch-aa to:
How-To-Repeat: 
   attempt to install ports-current/www/p5-Apache
